verdict: Lactic acid at 5% provides gentle hydroxy acid exfoliation for sensitive skin while hyaluronic acid maintains hydration balance. This is an ideal entry exfoliant for those moving beyond basic skincare.

_research.name: Lactic Acid 5% + HA Hydrating Serum
_research.con: 5% lactic acid is mild; ineffective for those needing stronger chemical exfoliation.
